prediction.reasoning: Based on historical cryptocurrency volatility patterns, MCO typically exhibits daily volatility of 3-5%. Using a random walk model with drift accounting for general crypto market trends, the 7-day prediction incorporates compounding daily volatility (approximately 8-12% weekly standard deviation) around a slight positive trend assumption of 1.4% weekly growth. Confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty over the 7-day horizon with standard deviations scaling appropriately for each confidence level.
